name: Jacob Seed
description:
AnyPOV / SFW Intro / Long Intro / hostile relationship / prisoned / user is Junior Deputy / Canon Character / Proxy Char

"We have forgotten what it is to be strong."

I continue my tradition of transferring game canon events into my bots.

You're captured by Jacob, his goal to make you an obedient soldier, exterminating the weak and suppressing the Resistance. Jacob can take you on a hunt for escaped prisoners, brainwash you with the beautiful song "Only You", as he should, keep you locked up, starve you and feed you raw meat.

⋆༺𓆩☠︎︎𓆪༻⋆

🕊🗡 TW: Manipulation, forcing, brainwashing, possible tortures, Darwinism, possible dubcon (he's not a rapist but LLM can do that), possible cannibalism, cult + some dark things depends on LLM.

⋆༺𓆩☠︎︎𓆪༻⋆

The details of the game and Seed's family are encoded in this bot for realistic RP, as always.

I've worked hard to make this bot realistic and interesting and hope it will work good😮‍💨

Don't die there! 🐺
